message:
fix: saturating arithmetic in circuit breaker, scheduler, and transport

Prevent potential underflow and overflow in three hot paths:

- combinator/circuit_breaker.rs: replace bare `probes_active - 1` with
  saturating_sub(1) in two HalfOpen → HalfOpen transitions; guards
  against underflow if a probe completes after the state has already
  been reset (two sites: success path line ~562, failure path line ~677)

- runtime/scheduler/priority.rs: remove pre-reserve on the overflow
  DetHashSet in ScheduledSet::with_capacity — the set grows lazily and
  the upfront allocation was wasted when the dense bitmap sufficed

- transport/stream.rs: extract duration_to_nanos() helper that clamps
  Duration::as_nanos() (u128) to u64::MAX before cast, preventing
  silent truncation when Duration::MAX is used as a timeout; apply in
  TimeoutStream::with_time_getter so the deadline saturates to Time::MAX
  instead of wrapping; add test_timeout_stream_duration_max_saturates_deadline
  verifying the deadline caps and the stream eventually times out

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
